standing: Born as the fifth spine step, first built as a generic driver-executor with run_driver and a method-registry (the goof: heartbeat, executor, and scheduler collapsed into one device).

Reworked the same evening to the heartbeat-only shape after Akien restored the lost property — a callback is the same unit however it fires — moving the resolve-and-fire logic into the shim and retiring run_driver, the registry, and the central-scheduler framing.
Proven to the heartbeat shape: a beat pulses every subscribed shim in order, firing lives in the shim, subscribe is idempotent and typed, and one shim raising cannot stop the beat.
Added roster() (the live nav for the web presentation surface) and shim_for(id), both the subscription list this device already owns; proven green under the tester.
